C:\Windows\system32\wsl.exe --distribution Ubuntu-22.04 --exec "/mnt/c/Users/Alsuwazj/AppData/Local/JetBrains/CLion 2024.1/bin/ttyfix" /bin/bash -c "export CLION_IDE=TRUE && export CMAKE_COLOR_DIAGNOSTICS=ON && export DISPLAY='172.24.240.1:0' && export JETBRAINS_IDE=TRUE && cd /home/alsuwazj/KeiRo/build && /usr/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -G 'CodeBlocks - Unix Makefiles' -S /home/alsuwazj/KeiRo -B /home/alsuwazj/KeiRo/build"
